birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In particular, a region named Valle de las Cotorras (Valley of the Parrots), located in the region between San Sebastián and Morovis, was home to a sizable population. Eventually their natural habitat was reduced to the Cordillera Central. By 1960 they were only to be found in primary forest at the Luquillo Mountains in El Yunque National Forest. The species is currently found at elevations between
